title: com.para.highlight.listHighlights
summary: List query for indexed highlight annotations with subject, creator, community, state, and pagination filters.
constraints: Filters support community, state, subject, and creator.
lifecycle: Powers browse, filter, and discovery views for public highlight annotations.
writers: Read-only query over indexed highlight state.
indexing: Serves from indexed highlight views rather than raw annotation records.
moderation: Visibility and subject filtering constrain what can be listed publicly.

fields.name: highlights
fields.description: Highlight views returned for the browse surface.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: Pagination cursor for continuing highlight browsing.
